briefdescription.para: Return the name for this catalog.
Create a namespace with associated properties.

parameterdescription.para: a key-value map of metadata for the namespace

simplesect.para: Status indicating success if created successfully; ErrorKind::kAlreadyExists if the namespace already exists; ErrorKind::kNotSupported if the operation is not supported

briefdescription.para: List child namespaces from the given namespace.

simplesect.para: a list of child namespaces; ErrorKind::kNoSuchNamespace if the given namespace does not exist

memberdef.definition: virtual Result< std::unordered_map< std::string, std::string > > iceberg::Catalog::GetNamespaceProperties
memberdef.name: GetNamespaceProperties

briefdescription.para: Get metadata properties for a namespace.

simplesect.para: a key-value map of metadata properties; ErrorKind::kNoSuchNamespace if the namespace does not exist
Status indicating success if dropped successfully; ErrorKind::kNoSuchNamespace if the namespace does not exist; ErrorKind::kNotAllowed if the namespace is not empty
true if the namespace exists, false otherwise

memberdef.argsstring: (const Namespace &ns, const std::unordered_map< std::string, std::string > &updates, const std::unordered_set< std::string > &removals)=0
memberdef.name: UpdateNamespaceProperties

briefdescription.para: Update a namespace's properties by applying additions and removals.

parameterdescription.para: a set of properties to add or overwrite
a set of property keys to remove

simplesect.para: Status indicating success if the update is successful; ErrorKind::kNoSuchNamespace if the namespace does not exist; ErrorKind::kUnsupported if the operation is not supported

briefdescription.para: Return all the identifiers under this namespace.

simplesect.para: a list of identifiers for tables or ErrorKind::kNoSuchNamespace if the namespace does not exist

memberdef.argsstring: (const TableIdentifier &identifier, const std::shared_ptr< Schema > &schema, const std::shared_ptr< PartitionSpec > &spec, const std::shared_ptr< SortOrder > &order, const std::string &location, const std::unordered_map< std::string, std::string > &properties)=0
memberdef.name: CreateTable

parameterdescription.para: a location for the table; leave empty if unspecified
a string map of table properties

simplesect.para: a Table instance or ErrorKind::kAlreadyExists if the table already exists

memberdef.argsstring: (const TableIdentifier &identifier, const std::vector< std::unique_ptr< TableRequirement > > &requirements, const std::vector< std::unique_ptr< TableUpdate > > &updates)=0
memberdef.name: UpdateTable

simplesect.para: a Table instance or ErrorKind::kAlreadyExists if the table already exists

memberdef.argsstring: (const TableIdentifier &identifier, const std::shared_ptr< Schema > &schema, const std::shared_ptr< PartitionSpec > &spec, const std::shared_ptr< SortOrder > &order, const std::string &location, const std::unordered_map< std::string, std::string > &properties)=0
memberdef.name: StageCreateTable

briefdescription.para: Start a transaction to create a table.

parameterdescription.para: a location for the table; leave empty if unspecified
a string map of table properties

simplesect.para: a Transaction to create the table or ErrorKind::kAlreadyExists if the table already exists

Result<bool> indicating table exists or not.
On success, the table existence was successfully checked (actual existence may be inferred elsewhere).
On failure, contains error information.

briefdescription.para: Drop a table; optionally delete data and metadata files.

detaileddescription.para: If purge is set to true the implementation should delete all data and metadata files.

parameterdescription.para: if true, delete all data and metadata files in the table

simplesect.para:
Status indicating the outcome of the operation.
On success, the table was dropped (or did not exist).
On failure, contains error information.

Status indicating the outcome of the operation.
On success, the table was renamed.
On failure, contains error information.
instance of Table implementation referred to by identifier or ErrorKind::kNoSuchTable if the table does not exist

briefdescription.para: Register a table with the catalog if it does not exist.

parameterdescription.para: the location of a metadata file

simplesect.para: a Table instance or ErrorKind::kAlreadyExists if the table already exists

briefdescription.para: A Catalog API for table create, drop, and load operations.

detaileddescription.para: Note that these functions are named after the corresponding operationId specified by the Iceberg Rest Catalog API.
